seoTitle: Windang vs Windella — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Windang and Windella. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Windang and Windella.
heading: Windang vs Windella — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Windang, New South Wales and Windella, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Windella has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Windang (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Windang or Windella safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Windang has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Windella scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Windang scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Windella scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Windang or Windella?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Windella has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
